# Feature: User Notification Preferences

**Workflow:** feature
**State:** spec
**Created:** 2026-04-12

## Problem Statement
Users cannot control which notifications they receive.

## User Stories
- As a user, I want to toggle email/push/SMS notifications per category

## Acceptance Criteria
- Settings page shows notification categories
- Users can toggle each channel per category
- Changes save immediately

## Out of Scope
- Notification delivery infrastructure (already exists)

## Open Questions
None — spec is clear.
